productDisplayName: Carrera Men Sporty Rubber Strap Yellow Watch
description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as masters in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and perfect for urban wear. Case diameter: 42 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Octagon Stainless steel case with black coating Rubber strap with branding Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Metallic hands Black busy dial with dots on the numbers Automated reading with date Magnifying glass above the reading of the date for easy reading Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for swimming, white water rafting, non-snorkelling water related work, and fishing
